dict.string: FloatingClock uses your approximate location to compute accurate sunrise, sunset, and civil-twilight times for the dawn/day/dusk/night glyph. City-level accuracy only — no precise GPS, no network, no data leaves your Mac.

FloatingClock uses your approximate location to compute accurate sunrise, sunset, and civil-twilight times for the dawn/day/dusk/night glyph. City-level accuracy only — no precise GPS, no network, no data leaves your Mac.
